tools.name: routheus_chains
tools.descriptionHash: cc6f85388aff1a6a69f6d38gle-input swap quotes and quote+calldata are free, rate-limited per IP — no payment or key), per-call USDC prices for paid products, supported EVM chains, x402 payment details, and a contact email for custom/higher-limit plans.

tools.name: routheus_chains
tools.description: List the DEX chains Routheus can quote on, with accepted path aliases (canonical slug, chain name, or EIP-155 id — e.g. eth = ethereum = 1).

tools.name: routheus_price_offer
tools.description: Get the price for a specific product, WITHOUT paying. For quote and quote_calldata it reports that a rate-limited FREE tier exists (call the returned URL with no X-PAYMENT header to use it); for all products it returns the exact x402 USDC offer and the ready-to-call HTTP URL. To get paid data, call

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: routheus_catalog, routheus_price_offer · Private data: routheus_catalog · Public sink: routheus_catalog.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: routheus_catalog, routheus_price_offer · Private data: routheus_catalog · Public sink: routheus_catalog

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
